# Alvin Villamero — Full-Stack Developer

> Alvin Villamero is a full-stack developer based in Davao City, Philippines, building complete web applications — frontend, backend, databases, and authentication — with TypeScript, Next.js, React, Vue, Node.js, and PostgreSQL. Open to full-time roles and available for remote freelance/contract work worldwide.

## About

- Full-stack developer, BS Information Technology (University of Mindanao, 2020)
- Location: Davao City, Philippines — remote-ready worldwide
- Core stack: TypeScript, JavaScript, Next.js, React, Vue, Node.js/Express, PostgreSQL (Prisma, Supabase), Firebase, Python, Tailwind CSS
- Also works with WordPress/Elementor and no-code platforms when they fit the project
- Prior background in IT infrastructure, support, and digital delivery for international teams

## Shipped full-stack projects

- [Zuqon AI](https://zuqon-dashboard.vercel.app/): AI-powered content pipeline — scrapes user-input topics from the web, rewrites them into original articles with AI-generated thumbnails, schedules/publishes to WordPress, then repurposes each article into Facebook, Twitter/X, and Instagram posts with AI-generated social images. TypeScript (75%), Python (24%), PostgreSQL.
- [UPC VOT Mintal](https://www.upcvotmintal.com/): church membership management system — 3 user roles (admin, caregroup leader, member), 3 membership tiers, unique per-member QR-code attendance, automated attendance status updates (node-cron), daily verse feature, and multi-format reporting. Next.js 14 (App Router, TypeScript), Tailwind, shadcn/ui, Node.js/Express, PostgreSQL + Prisma, NextAuth.js/JWT.
- [Invoice Tracker](https://tracker-invoice-generator.vercel.app/): invoice tracking and automatic generation for freelancers, with client-facing shared task progress for transparency. Next.js (App Router, TypeScript), Prisma, hosted PostgreSQL, email sign-in.
- [Teeveefy](https://teeveefy-app.vercel.app/): M3U IPTV playlist player with leanback-first UI for Android TV. Firebase.

## Services

- Full-stack web application development (frontend, backend, database, auth, deployment)
- API integration and backend work
- Website redesign or migration
- WordPress development
- Technical consulting / code review
